headline: Equifax Ataeva Launch Targets Lender Analytics As Shares Trade Below Value
summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) has partnered with Ataeva to launch the Ataeva Product Suite, using Equifax credit data to support portfolio optimization tools for lenders. The new suite introduces proprietary analytics designed to help financial institutions refine credit decisioning and customer targeting. The announcement comes as lenders continue to look for more granular metrics and data driven approaches to managing risk and growth. Equifax, trading at $172.56, comes into this partnership after a...
